body_excerpt: In multiple functions of af_vsock.c, there is a possible way to cause a use after free due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
